description:
Creates an issue via `CoordinationIssues::Public::CreateService`. Request body is **flat** JSON
(not wrapped in `coordination_issue`). See create schema for which fields are persisted vs accepted-only.

Observers may enqueue notifications / activity side effects.

201.description: Created — `data` is the new issue (`V2::CoordinationIssueBlueprint`, default view)

data.description:
Rendered by `V2::CoordinationIssueBlueprint`. **`id` is always present.** Other keys depend on `included`:
when `included` is omitted or empty, all conditional blueprint fields are serialized; when...

422.description: Validation or domain error (`render_model_errors` / unprocessable entity envelope)

schema.description:
Flat request body (not wrapped in `coordination_issue`). Persisted on create via
`CoordinationIssues::Public::CreateService#sanitized_params`: `title`, `creation_source`,
`bim_file_id` (stored as c...

project_id.description: Path includes project; may be echoed in body (ignored for scoping).

company_id.description: Company id for the new issue (typically matches path company).

description.description: Permitted by controller; not applied by `CreateService` — use PATCH to set.

location_id.description: Location id scoped to the project.

assignee_id.description: Login information / user id for assignee.

bim_file_id.description: BIM file id for the coordination issue file association.

due_date.description: Permitted by controller; not applied by `CreateService` — use PATCH to set.

issue_type.description: Permitted by controller; not applied by `CreateService` — use PATCH to set.

priority.description: Permitted by controller; not applied by `CreateService` — use PATCH to set.

attachment_upload_uuids.description: Prostore upload UUIDs for new attachments.

origin.description: Optional origin metadata stored with the issue when created or updated.
